message:
feat(storage): tick 139 notification cluster cx-first siblings (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Eighteenth sibling-expansion tick. Adds 6 new storage `_with_cx`
siblings for the notification-history cluster.

New siblings:
- record_notification_with_cx (write path)
- update_notification_status_with_cx (write path)
- acknowledge_notification_with_cx (write path)
- increment_notification_retry_with_cx (write path)
- query_notification_history_with_cx (read path)
- get_notification_with_cx (read path)

Each sibling does a pre-flight `cx.checkpoint()?` for cancellation
budget honouring, then delegates to the unchanged legacy impl.

Test: `storage_tick139_notification_cluster_roundtrip` exercises
the full delivery lifecycle: record Pending → get → update to Sent
→ acknowledge → increment_retry (which resets to Pending per the
method contract) → query_history. Verified via fork bypass:
486/486 storage:: tests pass.

Storage cx-first coverage: 81 + 6 = 87 siblings across 140 legacy
pub async fns. 53 legacy methods still lack a sibling; notification
cluster now fully covered.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
